name: e2e_run
description: Run E2E browser tests. Specify "all" to run every suite, "suite" for a specific suite, or "file" for a JSON file path. Returns structured results with pass/fail status, duration, and error details.

arguments.name: file
arguments.desc: Path to a JSON test file

name: e2e_list
description: List all available E2E test suites with their test names and counts.

name: e2e_create_test
description: Create a new E2E test JSON file. Provide the suite name and an array of test objects, each with a name and actions array.

arguments.name: tests
arguments.desc: Array of test objects with name, actions, and optional expect

arguments.name: hooks
arguments.desc: Optional lifecycle hooks (beforeAll, beforeEach, afterEach, afterAll)

name: e2e_create_module
description: Create a reusable module for E2E tests. Modules define action sequences referenced via { "$use": "module-name", "params": {...} }.

arguments.name: params
arguments.desc: Parameter definitions with required flag and defaults

name: e2e_pool_status
description: Get the status of the Chrome pool (browserless/chrome). Shows availability, running sessions, capacity, and queued requests.

name: e2e_screenshot
description: Retrieve a screenshot by its hash (e.g. ss:a3f2b1c9). Returns the image.

arguments.name: hash
arguments.desc: Screenshot hash with or without ss: prefix

name: e2e_capture
description: Capture a screenshot of any URL on demand. Connects to the Chrome pool, navigates to the URL, takes a screenshot, and returns the image with its ss:HASH.

arguments.name: selector
arguments.desc: Wait for this selector before capture

arguments.name: delay
arguments.desc: Wait this many ms after page load

arguments.name: authToken
arguments.desc: JWT token to inject into localStorage

name: e2e_analyze
description: Analyze a page's structure and return all interactive elements with their CSS selectors, plus suggested test scaffolds.

name: e2e_dashboard_start
description: Start the E2E Runner web dashboard. Provides a real-time UI for running tests, viewing results, screenshots, history, and pool status.

name: e2e_dashboard_stop
description: Stop the E2E Runner web dashboard.

name: e2e_dashboard_restart
description: Restart the E2E Runner web dashboard. Stops current instance and starts a new one.

name: e2e_issue
description: Fetch a GitHub/GitLab issue and prepare E2E test generation. Returns issue details and a prompt for test creation. Use mode "verify" to auto-generate and run tests.

name: e2e_network_logs
description: Query network request/response logs for a specific test run. Use the runDbId from e2e_run results to drill down.

arguments.name: runDbId
arguments.desc: Run database ID from e2e_run results

name: e2e_learnings
description: Query the E2E learning system for insights about test stability, flaky tests, selector health, page health, API health, error patterns, and trends.

arguments.name: query
arguments.desc: Query type: summary, flaky, selectors, pages, apis, errors, trends, test:<name>, page:<path>

name: e2e_vars
description: Manage project variables stored in SQLite. Variables can be referenced in test JSON as {{var.KEY}}.

name: e2e_neo4j
description: Manage the Neo4j knowledge graph container for E2E learnings. Requires Docker.
